top_signals.title: Ebola Outruns Containment in Eastern Congo as Contact Tracing Falters
top_signals.summary: Ebola is spreading faster than responders can track it in eastern Congo, where health workers managed to follow up with barely one in five identified contacts in a single day.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
